pr-evidence/benchmark-plan-execution-wri.gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5 reviewers found backward-compatibility gaps for old serializer and writer hooks. Both were fixed with compatibility dispatch plus regression tests, and final GPT-5.5 reviewer Pascal approved the PR as clean.
verification: poetry run pytest -q tests/test_benchmark_plan_executor.py tests/test_release_bundle.py tests/test_public_package.py
poetry run python -m compileall -q src tests
what_changed: Benchmark plan execution JSON writing now accepts plan_source directly while preserving old serializer and writer monkeypatch hooks.
pr-evidence/benchmark-plan-execution-wri.why: Release bundles require plan-execution provenance, and writing that provenance directly makes the execution artifact path less fragile while retaining compatibility for legacy Databricks test hooks.
